description: Reference geography schema for Oslo-related retrieval, routing, and structured query work.

notes: Use this layer for general Oslo geography understanding and conversation-state normalization.
Sentrum and Marka may appear in some municipal statistics contexts, but they are not included in the 15 standard bydeler list here.

areas: Urban settlements with more than 20,000 inhabitants
Urban settlements with between 200 and 1,999 inhabitants and sparsely populated areas
notes: Use the exact SSB published area labels for structured queries.
Do not rewrite these labels into bydeler unless the official source itself publishes bydel-level figures.

rules: A bydel is not the same as an SSB published rent area label.
Oslo and Baerum municipality must not be decomposed into Oslo bydeler in structured answers.
If a user asks for a bydel-level rent answer and the source only provides municipality or area-group data, the assistant should say that the source is not published at bydel level.

rag: Use bydeler for general place recognition, follow-up question resolution, and query understanding.
structured_query: Use exact SSB published area labels for filters, queries, and answer citations.
answer_generation: State clearly when the available data is municipality-level or area-group-level rather than bydel-level.
